name: CGMPriorAuthorizationBCBSCA
title: Continuous Glucose Monitoring Prior Authorization - BCBS CA

item.text: Does the patient have a confirmed diagnosis of Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus?
What is the patient's most recent HbA1c value and date?
Is the patient currently on insulin therapy (basal, bolus, or pump)?
What insulin product and dose is the patient currently prescribed?
Does the patient have any contraindications to CGM device use?
What is the clinical justification for CGM at this time?
